compiled_state.description:
# Split build_server() (703-LOC single function) into tool registrars

## What
`mcp_server.py:295-997` is one ~703-LOC function of ~40 `@server.tool` closures — the longest function in the tree. Split into `register_read_tools(server, …)` / `register_write_tools(server, …)` / `register_llm_tools(server, …)` grouped by the existing read/write/LLM taxonomy; `build_server` discovers + wires them. Lift the `run_workflow` background-orchestration and `reconcile` mode-gating out of the tool bodies.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `build_server` delegates to per-cluster registrars; each registrar is on-target size (200-400 LOC).
- [ ] The MCP tool set + gating (readonly/allow_llm/allow_jira_sync) are unchanged (coverage test green).
- [ ] `make lint` + MCP suites pass; commit carries a `rebar-ticket:` trailer.
compiled_state.title: Split build_server() (703-LOC single function) into tool registrars
